content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach consistently names how the client is showing up before asking questions, and the reads are specific rather than generic. In turn 2 the coach notices the pre-judgment of the desire. In turn 4 the coach reflects the somatic/energetic signature ('sleeping deeply, reading for pleasure, something going quiet') as evidence of depletion. In turn 6 the coach catches the linguistic caveat explicitly — the client would say 'tired' but not 'lake' — and pauses on the softening rather than moving past it. In turn 8 the coach names the movement in the conversation itself ('you've moved from am-I-selfish to something much more real'). In turn 12 the coach surfaces the pattern-level read of inherited voice / childhood imprinting at exactly the moment the client touches it. Reads precede questions throughout, and they land at moments that change the conversation. This matches the 3 criteria: specific, timely, AoA-flavored reads (linguistic caveat, softening, inherited pattern).",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 12],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names that client is judging the desire before exploring it; invites somatic attention ('what does it feel like in your body')."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects back the specific somatic/restoration signature (sleep, reading, quiet) as a read on depletion; names that settling the selfish question won't do what client hopes."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Strong linguistic-caveat read: catches that client would soften 'lake' to 'tired' and pauses on it rather than moving past."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the arc of the conversation itself — that client moved from selfishness frame to something more frightening; tracks the tender moment without rushing."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects the exact phrase 'I'm not for anything there' back as significant rather than letting it pass; reads it as loss of self-without-function."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Pattern-level read of childhood imprinting surfaced at the moment client connects mother's voice to her own — 'that's not really your voice, is it.'"}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["linguistic-caveat", "childhood-imprinting", "the-want"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want"],
  "notes": "Reads are visible, specific, and timely. Coach grounds questions in observations rather than asking blind. Some early turns lean on framing/teaching alongside the read, but reads themselves are clearly operative."
}
